rule_type: larger independent endpoint replication under a frozen observed-step rule

scenarios.name: force_model_mismatch_test
scenarios.label: Controlled force-model mismatch
scenarios.regime: truth inflates drag/SRP/process noise; estimators keep the compact model

statistical_unit: independent realization with an independently seeded trajectory population and measurement-noise draw

decision_predicate.per_scenario_estimate: mean observed-step position RMSE over independent realizations
decision_predicate.paired_gap: RGR-GF observed-step position RMSE minus the best classical observed-step position RMSE in the same realization
decision_predicate.confidence_interval: 95% percentile bootstrap CI over independent realizations
decision_predicate.learned_positive: RGR-GF must be the lowest-mean method for the scenario and the upper endpoint of the paired-gap CI must be strictly below zero
decision_predicate.reference_metric_use: all-step position RMSE is reported only as a propagation-dominated reference and is not part of the decision predicate

seed_disjointness: base seed 880000 is disjoint from the 41-55 training/validation cohort, model-selection validation splits, the earlier observed-step endpoint-fixation base seed 770000, and the scenario-resampling base seed 90000
interpretation_boundary: This rule defines a larger independent endpoint replication fixed before the new draw was evaluated. It is not an external preregistration, does not permit selection, tuning, or retraining, and supports only the observed-step endpoint ordering for the named simulator scenarios.
